name: openmetrics
explanation: The OpenMetrics integration is a generic, user-supplied scraper for arbitrary Prometheus / OpenMetrics endpoints. It has no upstream system to discover — the user MUST provide `openmetrics_endpoint` (or legacy `prometheus_url`), a `namespace`, and a `metrics` allowlist that names which series to collect. There is no canonical port, path, or default that a probe could derive: any of the dozens of integrations elsewhere in this repo is a more specific instance of OpenMetrics. By definition this integration is the user-config-required fallback, so auto-config cannot apply.
notes: Special case: this integration exists precisely so the user can point the Agent at an arbitrary endpoint. No upstream exists to autodiscover. Method `other` (not `credentials-required`) because the missing input is the endpoint URL/metric list itself, not authentication. Suggest a new procedure pattern for 'user-supplied generic check'.
